results.title: Turn AI search into a Growth Channel - GetMint
results.content:
YOUR PROBLEM

## AI is already recommending brands. Just not yours.

1.7B people ask AI every month. When they search your category, do you show up?

### You don't show up.

Most buyers ask AI before they decide. There are no ten blue links in that moment, just a recommendation. If your brand isn't in it, you're not in the running.

### You can't measure it.

AI answers shift by model and by run. A few manual checks can't tell you where you really stand.

### You can't act on it.

Even when you spot a gap, closing it means new content, new tools, and lost time.

## Measure. Strategize. Grow. The full AI search loop.

INTRODUCING GETMINT

Most AI Search tools monitor. Some create content. None do both with proprietary data behind every decision.

# Turn AI search into a Growth Channel

GetMint runs the full loop: track how ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, AI Overviews, and Alexa for Shopping mention and recommend your brand, strategize your next moves with an AI Search agent and our experts, then produce and publish the content that gets your brand mentioned.

Start free trial

Start free trialBook a demo

Book a demo

##### They track their AI visibility. Do you?

YOUR PROBLEM [...] STEP 01

  ### Connect your brand

  Enter your brand name, competitors, and strategic topics. GetMint generates your prompt library automatically and runs a full scan across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and AI Overviews.
 

  STEP 02

  ### Get your action plan

  The GEO agent shows you where you're absent, who's winning, and which gaps to close first.
 

  STEP 03

  ### Create, publish, grow

  Use Content Studio to produce AI-ready content. Distribute it on the sources LLMs actually cite. Track your visibility score as it climbs week after week.

FULL ENGINE COVERAGE

One platform. Ten engines. Zero blind spots.

View organization page for GetMint

1,514 followers

AI traffic may look small - but its impact is massive.
👉 ChatGPT sessions convert up to 9x more than traditional organic traffic.
👉 AI mentions increase branded searches by +44%.
👉 Users who consult AI are 23x more likely to convert.
The challenge? Most brands don’t know how to measure or improve their AI visibility.
Our new playbook “The Ultimate AI SEO Ranking Playbook”, shows how to turn AI search into a real growth lever.
Learn how to:
🔹 Track brand visibility inside AI-generated answers
🔹 Identify where LLMs source their recommendations
🔹 Build a GEO strategy that drives influence, not just clicks
📕 Download the playbook: 

graphical user interface, application

To view or add a comment, sign in

## More Relevant Posts [...] Stop optimizing for Google. Start optimizing for Claude.
The search landscape is fracturing. Your customers aren't just using Google anymore. They're asking Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Copilot.
Each AI model has different training data. Different ranking logic. Different biases.
What ranks #1 in Google might be invisible in Claude. And vice versa.
This is where most brands fail. They assume one-size-fits-all SEO works for AI visibility. It doesn't.
Our approach:
→ Map your presence across 100+ AI models
→ Identify gaps and opportunities
→ Optimize for semantic relevance (not keywords)
→ Monitor shifts in real-time
The brands winning in 2026 aren't betting on one platform. They're dominating across all of them.
Ready to be everywhere your customers search? [...] Just hopped off a call with a company that’s thinking about improving their AI visibility, and a question came up that I hear all the time.
“Okay, but what’s the search volume for these prompts? I'm really confused...”
Totally understandable, that’s how we’ve all been trained to think with SEO.
The honest answer is: there isn’t a clean number.
You don’t get a tidy dashboard telling you how many times someone asked a specific question in ChatGPT.
But that’s not new.
There have been plenty of moments where we knew people were using a platform or asking certain questions, even if we couldn’t quantify it perfectly. The behavior was obvious, even if the metrics lagged behind.
What’s changing now is the decision point.
Before people search, before they talk to sales, they ask AI.

results.title: GetMint: Details, Reviews, Pricing, & Features
results.content:
## GetMint Company Overview

GetMintlaunched in 2025 from Paris with three co-founders: Joan Burkovic, Matthieu Poitrimolt, and Emmanuel Costa. The company addresses a fundamental shift in how consumers discover brands—when potential customers ask AI assistants for recommendations, brands that don't appear in those responses lose revenue to competitors who do.

The problem is urgent. With 1.6 billion monthly users of AI search globally and 50% of consumers now relying on AI for purchasing decisions, traditional SEO strategies don't translate to this new landscape. Brands lack effective tools to monitor their presence in LLM-generated responses or understand which content gaps prevent AI discoverability. [...] The company's Paris base and investor profile (Founders Future, Kima Ventures) suggest initial focus on French and European markets before potential global expansion. With just 11,377 monthly website visits, market penetration remains limited.

## GetMint Buyer Personas

End Users

Marketing managers and content strategists at mid-market B2B companies waste 8+ hours weekly monitoring brand visibility across fragmented AI platforms (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews, Gemini), losing $12K+ monthly in productivity while competitors capture AI-driven discovery. They need consolidated visibility tracking to identify where AI models reference their products and what content gaps prevent discoverability.

Buyers [...] ## GetMint TL;DR

# GetMint SummaryGetMint helps brands and marketing agencies optimize their visibility in AI-powered search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews through real-time monitoring, content gap analysis, and strategic distribution across a network of 150,000+ media partners. The Paris-based platform serves B2B companies ranging from startups to enterprises, with dedicated tools for agencies managing multiple clients. What sets GetMint apart is its focus on Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—a specialized approach to AI discoverability that's distinct from traditional SEO—combined with its publisher network that lets brands influence which sources AI models reference when answering customer questions.

## GetMint Company Overview

results.title: GetMint's Content Studio: AI-Powered Visibility Gaps Detection and Execution | GetMint posted on the topic | LinkedIn
results.content:
👏 Big news: Content Studio is live.
GetMint now has two connected engines.
AI Search Analytics shows you where your brand is missing from AI answers, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, AI Overviews.
Content Studio turns those gaps into action.
Here's what that looks like:
You spot a visibility gap on a strategic prompt → Content Studio analyzes the cores sources → builds a brief targeted by persona → your internal experts contribute by email in 5 min → you publish content optimized for SEO & GEO.
Then you track the visibility lift. And iterate.
Detection and execution. In one platform. Connected.
We built Content Studio because every customer told us the same thing: "We can see the gaps. But we don't know what to do next."
Now they do. [...] 👏 Big news: Content Studio is live.
GetMint now has two connected engines.
AI Search Analytics shows you where your brand is missing from AI answers, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, AI Overviews.
Content Studio turns those gaps into action.
Here's what that looks like:
You spot a visibility gap on a strategic prompt → Content Studio analyzes the cores sources → builds a brief targeted by persona → your internal experts contribute by email in 5 min → you publish content optimized for SEO & GEO.
Then you track the visibility lift. And iterate.
Detection and execution. In one platform. Connected.
We built Content Studio because every customer told us the same thing: "We can see the gaps. But we don't know what to do next."
Now they do. [...] Ranking is no longer the goal. Being cited is.
We’re entering a new phase of search where:
👉 Users don’t browse
👉 AI answers
And AI doesn’t show 10 results…
It selects a few trusted sources and builds the answer from them.
If your brand isn’t part of that shortlist,
you’re not just outranked — you’re excluded.
This is where AI Search Optimization comes in.
It’s not about keywords anymore.
It’s about:
• Authority signals
• Structured, AI-readable content
• E-E-A-T that machines can verify
• And backlinks that build trust beyond Google
Because AI tools like ChatGPT and Perplexity don’t just “crawl”…
They choose who to trust.
And trust is now the real ranking factor.
We broke this down step-by-step here:
🔗 
If you’re still doing SEO like it’s 2020,
you’re already behind.
